name: First American Title Agency Services
description_short: First American Title Agency Services provides title insurance, settlement, and underwriting services for residential and commercial real estate transactions across Pennsylvania.
description_long:
First American Title Agency Services is a Pennsylvania-based division of First American Title, a major title insurance and settlement services provider operating across multiple states. The company serves title agents and attorneys by providing underwriting support, settlement services, and technology solutions to facilitate real estate closings. Their Pennsylvania operations are headquartered in Berwyn with an additional office in Pittsburgh, staffed with dedicated sales managers, underwriting counsel, and support representatives.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including residential and commercial title production, title search and property data services, refinance automation tools, escrow services, and title settlement software. They provide AgentNet Knowledge, an underwriting guidance and education platform for title agents, along with specialized commercial title services that include escrow production and commercial funding. Their technology solutions are designed to streamline workflows and optimize closing processes for agencies of various sizes.

First American Title distinguishes itself through its integration of expert underwriting guidance with operational technology tools. The company maintains a team of specialized underwriting counsel and area underwriters dedicated to Pennsylvania, ensuring localized expertise. They emphasize "industry-leading product and service solutions" and position themselves as supporting agents and attorneys through complete integrated tools rather than serving end consumers directly.

This is a B2B service provider focused on supporting title agents and attorneys rather than directly servicing individual mortgage borrowers. While they operate within the mortgage/real estate ecosystem, their actual customers are title professionals and closing agents. Consumers would interact with this company indirectly through their title agent or closing attorney. The company's value proposition depends heavily on adoption by local title professionals.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Dedicated Pennsylvania team including state manager, regional underwriting counsel, and area underwriters for localized expertise
Integrated software solutions optimized for Pennsylvania real estate requirements and regional closing procedures
Commercial title services with escrow production and commercial funding options for complex transactions
Multiple office locations in Pennsylvania (Berwyn and Pittsburgh) for regional accessibility
AgentNet Knowledge platform provides ongoing underwriting guidance and education for agent partners
Comprehensive title and data production capabilities including automated refinance tools
Remote Online Notary (RON) services to streamline closing processes
cons: B2B model means consumers cannot directly use services—must work through a title agent or attorney partner
No pricing information or fee structures disclosed on the website for prospective agent partners
Limited transparency about specific underwriting timelines or turn-time guarantees despite claims of 'faster turn times'
best_for: Title agents and attorneys in Pennsylvania seeking underwriting support and settlement services
Real estate closing professionals looking for integrated technology and workflow management solutions
Commercial real estate closing professionals handling complex escrow and funding requirements
diagnosis: First American Title Agency Services is designed for Pennsylvania-based title agents, attorneys, and closing professionals seeking underwriting expertise and technology solutions rather than for individual consumers. End consumers would access these services indirectly through a title professional partner during real estate transactions; direct contact with First American would occur only if you are a licensed title agent or attorney.
services: Commercial title services with escrow production
Title search and property data services
Marketing and sales support for agents
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: Two Liberty Place, 50 S 16th St Suite 2600, Philadelphia, PA 19102
